attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
 WSAT.SALES_CREDIT_ASSGN_RTE_OLY_KEY
 ,WSAT.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD
 ,WSAT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           
 ,WSAT.SALES_REP_NUMBER              
 ,WSAT.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD          
 ,WSAT.EP_TRANSACTION_ID_INT         
 ,WSAT.SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT      
 ,WSAT.SCA_SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM         
 ,WSAT.DV_SCA_SOURCE_COMMIT_DT       
 ,WSAT.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD            
 ,WSAT.SCA_SOURCE_UPDATE_DTM         
 ,WSAT.DV_SCA_SOURCE_UPDATE_DT       
 ,WSAT.SK_LINE_ID_INT                
 ,WSAT.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT            
 ,WSAT.SS_CD                         
 ,WSAT.SPLIT_1_OFFER_ATTRIB_PCT      
 ,WSAT.SPLIT_2_NEW_RENEW_PCT         
 ,WSAT.TOTAL_SPLIT_PCT               
 ,WSAT.SALES_MOTION_CD               
 ,WSAT.SPLIT_2_TYPE_CD               
 ,WSAT.SK_TRX_SPLIT_ID_INT           
 ,WSAT.RTNR_UNIQUE_ID                
 ,WSAT.BK_TRANSACTION_SPLIT_BU_ID    
 ,WSAT.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT   
 ,WSAT.SK_RTNR_ATTRIBUTION_KEY_INT   
 ,WSAT.EP_TRX_SPLIT_SC_ID_INT        
 ,WSAT.START_TV_DTM                  
 ,WSAT.END_TV_DTM                    
 ,WSAT.EDW_CREATE_DTM                
 ,WSAT.EDW_CREATE_USER               
 ,WSAT.EDW_UPDATE_DTM                
 ,WSAT.EDW_UPDATE_USER     
FROM  $$WORKDB.W_SCA_RTE_TRX_OLY_RTNR WSAT
WHERE WSAT.DML_TYPE='I'
 AND NOT EXISTS
 (SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SCA_RTE_TRX_OLY_RTNR_TV NSAT
 WHERE NSAT.SALES_CREDIT_ASSGN_RTE_OLY_KEY   = WSAT.SALES_CREDIT_ASSGN_RTE_OLY_KEY)
